# BarBook Texas

> Texas liquor license intelligence platform. Search verified TABC license data, revenue reports, violations, and new applications.

## About

BarBook Texas aggregates and organizes public liquor license data from the Texas Alcoholic Beverage Commission (TABC) and the Texas Comptroller's Mixed Beverage Gross Receipts reports. The platform covers 80,000+ active licenses across 2,800+ cities and all 254 Texas counties.

## Data Sources

- Texas Alcoholic Beverage Commission (TABC) — license records, violations, enforcement actions
- Texas Comptroller of Public Accounts — Mixed Beverage Gross Receipts (monthly revenue data)

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://barbooktx.com/) — Search and browse all Texas liquor licenses
- [Directory](https://barbooktx.com/directory) — Searchable directory with filters by type, city, county, status
- [Top Revenue](https://barbooktx.com/top-revenue) — Highest-grossing establishments by reported revenue
- [Violations](https://barbooktx.com/violations) — Recent TABC enforcement actions and suspensions
- [New Applications](https://barbooktx.com/new-applications) — Recently filed license applications
- [Data Lists](https://barbooktx.com/pricing) — Downloadable CSV datasets for purchase
- [About](https://barbooktx.com/about) — Data methodology and company information

## City Pages

Browse licenses by city: https://barbooktx.com/cities/{city-name}
Examples: /cities/houston, /cities/dallas, /cities/austin, /cities/san-antonio

## License Detail Pages

Individual license records: https://barbooktx.com/licenses/{slug}
Each page includes: business name, address, license type, status, revenue history, violation records.

## Data Update Frequency

- License data: synced daily from TABC
- Revenue data: updated monthly (published by Texas Comptroller)

## Contact

data@barbooktx.com
